data.body: [operator-attested] Concrete attestation evidence (captured this session, 2026-07-14): (1) Git-email resolution — with git user.email=joeoakhart+bot@navapbc.com, `python3 -c 'from rebar._commands.identity import resolve_current_identity; print(resolve_current_identity())'` returned exactly '594c-9dcf-5ad6-4e6d' (the Rebar Bot identity). (2) SSM — `aws ssm get-parameter --name /rebar/prod/rebar-bot-signing-key --with-decryption` returned {Name: /rebar/prod/rebar-bot-signing-key, Type: SecureString, Version: 1}, and its decrypted value byte-matched the generated private key (verified earlier via string compare). (3) GitHub — `gh secret list --repo navapbc/rebar` shows REBAR_BOT_SIGNING_KEY (updated 2026-07-14T03:47:15Z). Nothing secret committed; the private key was generated only in the git-ignored job tmp dir.
